name: Dark Golden Queen
description: Dark Golden Queen is the Dark counterpart of the Golden Queen in Skylanders: Imaginators. She is included in the Dark Edition of Imaginators, along with Dark King Pen and Dark Wolfgang, and a Dark Doom Raider boss in Skylanders: Ring of Heroes.
biography: Dark Golden Queen is the Dark counterpart of the Golden Queen in Skylanders: Imaginators. She is included in the Dark Edition of Imaginators, along with Dark King Pen and Dark Wolfgang. As a Dark variant, she is made of black gold, a rare substance that cannot be 24 karats as it is created through alloys or surface alterations. She also appears as a Dark Doom Raider boss in Skylanders: Ring of Heroes.
personality: As a Dark counterpart to the Golden Queen, she likely shares her original's authoritative and greedy personality, manifested through her rare black gold form.

story.content: Dark Golden Queen is the Dark counterpart of the Golden Queen in Skylanders: Imaginators. She is included in the Dark Edition of Imaginators, along with Dark King Pen and Dark Wolfgang, and a Dark Doom Raider boss in Skylanders: Ring of Heroes.

trivia: Dark Golden Queen is made of black gold; though it's not naturally found in real life, black gold can be obtained by a process in jewelry by various methods, including cobalt alloys or altering its surface.
This would mean that Dark Golden Queen, unlike the regular one, cannot be 24 karats, as she is not made of pure gold.
She is the second Dark counterpart that belongs to the Earth element, the first being Dark Slobber Tooth.
She, Dark Stealth Elf and Dark Super Shot Stealth Elf are the only dark edition counterparts of female Skylanders.
She is the only one of the three that is not a version of Stealth Elf.
gameplay: In Skylanders: Imaginators, Dark Golden Queen is an Earth element Sensei of the Sorcerer class. She possesses the same moveset as the standard Golden Queen. While she has specific Power Stats including Strength (80), Defense (200), Agility (150), and Luck (320), these are listed for completeness and are not actively used in-game.

basic.name: Winged Scarabs
basic.content: A primary attack where the Queen unleashes Winged Scarabs to attack enemies.

basic.name: Golden Shockwave
basic.content: A secondary attack that creates a Golden Shockwave to repel and damage enemies.

basic.name: Royal Guard
basic.content: A defensive move involving summoning a Royal Guard to the Queen's aid.

basic_upgrades.name: Golden Opportunity
basic_upgrades.content: An upgrade that provides a Golden Opportunity for increased damage or collecting wealth.

soulgems.name: Royal Treatment
soulgems.content: The ultimate attack providing the Royal Treatment to all foes.
